font.i: "I need to design a simple RC low-pass filter that attenuates frequencies above 1 kHz, using standard resistor and capacitor values. Can you provide a circuit schematic for this filter, specifying appropriate component values to achieve the desired cutoff frequency?"

font.i: "This circuit implements a basic RC low-pass filter with a cutoff frequency of 1 kHz. It allows signals below 1 kHz to pass with minimal attenuation while attenuating higher frequencies. The filter uses standard component values: a 16 kΩ resistor and a 10 nF capacitor, which together set the -3 dB cutoff frequency at approximately 1 kHz
